name: zotero-pp-mcp
description: Zotero API surface as MCP tools.

zotero_api_key.title: ZOTERO_API_KEY
zotero_api_key.description: Optional. Only needed for the Zotero web API at api.zotero.org (group libraries, access while desktop is closed). Leave blank when using the local Zotero desktop app at localhost:23119.
